## Verification

- [ ] Tests or validation fixtures cover the change.
- [ ] Generated schemas, examples, defaults, and release reports are updated.
- [ ] `./scripts/verify_release.sh` passes.
- [ ] No confidential data, credentials, personal paths, or unpublished material is included.
- [ ] Third-party attribution or data-rights notes are updated when applicable.
- [ ] Documentation preserves the non-claim boundary and does not imply regulator acceptance.
